data.title: B² Network launches on-chain AI collaboration basic protocol: Signal-Driven Agentic AI
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News B² Network officially released the Signal-Driven Agentic AI protocol on May 15, a set of on-chain infrastructure designed for multi-agent (AI Agents) collaboration. The protocol supports AI division of labor, native on-chain, and auditable tracking, and is committed to building an open, efficient, and reliable AI collaborative network.
The system breaks down the Agent workflow into five steps: Sense, Plan, Decide, Act, and Learn. Each step is handled by a different "expert agent" and connected and scheduled through on-chain Signal events. Finally, it is submitted, aggregated, and anchored in Bitcoin through B² Rollup and B² Hub. All operations are signed on the chain, which is auditable, traceable, supports paid subscriptions and privacy protection. It is a truly intelligent Agent collaboration flow that is suitable for Web3.
Users can obtain on-chain benefits by running Agents and participate in network governance and system growth. The project party said that the protocol is not only an upgrade of AI infrastructure, but also a key step in promoting the Bitcoin network to move towards a smart collaborative future.

data.title: Fold Holdings Reports Increased Revenue Amid Rising Bitcoin Holdings
data.description:
According to PANews, Fold Holdings, a Bitcoin financial services company, reported a first-quarter revenue of $7.1 million, marking a 44% increase compared to the previous year. However, the company's net loss widened to $48.9 million. 

Fold Holdings' Bitcoin holdings have grown to 1,490 BTC, valued at $150 million, representing a 50% increase from the fourth quarter of last year. The company's trading platform processed $250 million in transaction volume during the first quarter, with active accounts surpassing 600,000.

In February of this year, Fold Holdings completed its listing on Nasdaq. Currently, the value of its Bitcoin holdings accounts for approximately 35% of its market capitalization.

data.title: LBank will list Izzy (IZZY)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch Izzy (IZZY) at 11:30 (SGT) on May 16, and open the IZZY/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 11:00 on May 17.

data.title: California Pension Fund Invests in Bitcoin Through MicroStrategy Shares
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin Magazine journalist @Vivek4real reported on the X platform that the California pension fund has disclosed its purchase of MicroStrategy (MSTR) shares worth $276 million. This investment represents an indirect approach to investing in Bitcoin.

data.title: Gate.io ranks first in the industry's solvency with a reserve ratio of 128.58%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin.com News released an analysis report on the top ten cryptocurrency exchanges in the world in 2025. The latest data from the cryptocurrency exchange Gate.io shows that its reserve ratio has reached 128.58%, the on-chain reserves exceed US$10 billion, and the user scale has exceeded 22 million. In the first quarter of 2025, the platform's contract trading volume increased by 31%, and continued to strengthen the liquidity layout of key markets. 
Compared with the 100% reserve proof standard commonly used in the industry, Gate.io builds a security moat through excess reserves, and its "silent giant" strategy focuses on improving user experience and expanding compliance. The platform currently supports more than 1,800 trading pairs, focusing on the deep liquidity of altcoins.

data.title: Brazilian Firm Méliuz Acquires $28.4 Million in Bitcoin
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Brazilian publicly traded company Méliuz has purchased Bitcoin valued at $28.4 million, marking it as the first listed company in Brazil to include Bitcoin in its balance sheet. This strategic asset allocation received overwhelming support from the company's shareholders.

data.title: The crypto market continued to pull back, with the PayFi sector leading the decline by 4.37%, while the CeFi sector and BTC remained relatively strong
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, the crypto market continued to pull back, with the PayFi sector leading the decline by 4.37% in 24 hours, of which XRP fell by 5.28%, but Bitcoin Cash (BCH) rose by 0.63%. The CeFi sector was relatively strong, rising by 1.13% in 24 hours. Within the sector, Bitget token (BGB) and Hyperliquid (HYPE) rose by 3.31% and 4.75% respectively.
In addition, Bitcoin (BTC) rose by 1.12% in 24 hours to above $104,000, while Ethereum (ETH) fell by 0.05%, fluctuating narrowly around $2,500.
In other sectors, the Layer1 sector fell by 0.23%, but Binance Coin (BNB) and Sui (SUI) rose by 1.01% and 1.33% respectively. The DeFi sector fell 1.78%, Raydium (RAY) surged 4.22% during the session; the Meme sector fell 2.60%, Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) and Mog Coin (MOG) rose 2.48% and 6.94% respectively; the Layer2 sector fell 3.88%, and Movement (MOVE) fell 9.34%.
The crypto sector index, which reflects the historical market conditions of the sector, shows that the ssiCeFi and ssiLayer1 indexes rose 1.34% and 0.05% respectively in 24 hours.

data.title: USDT issuance on TRON accounts for more than 50% of total issuance, Justin Sun says the target is 100 billion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the latest data from Tether's official website, the issuance of USDT on the TRON network has exceeded 75.7 billion US dollars, officially surpassing the total issuance of Ethereum and accounting for more than half of the total market value of USDT.
Sun Yuchen, founder of TRON, posted on the X platform, "Currently, 50.2% of the total supply of USDT is on the TRON network. Although 0.2% seems to be a small number, we can now say that more than half of the USDT is on the TRON network. Keep going, the goal is 100 billion, it is not a dream, it is a preview!"

data.title: Friday Trading Costs Surge Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Barclays Plc analysis indicates that the demand for portfolio adjustments on Fridays significantly increases the cost of trading high-grade corporate bonds by 31% compared to other days. Impax's Trzcinka noted increased market activity on Fridays, highlighting uncertainty about weekend developments.

Historically, Fridays were the cheapest day for bond trading, but this trend has reversed. Barclays analysts Zornitsa Todorova and Andrea Diaz Lafuente reported that in March and April, investment-grade corporate bond trading on Fridays accounted for 18% of weekly volume, up from 16% in 2023 and 2024.

Since U.S. President Donald Trump resumed office, market activity has seen broader fluctuations due to his unpredictable policy decisions on tariffs, immigration, and foreign affairs, contributing to the heightened Friday trading pace. Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Athanasios Psarofagis found that the average weekly stock market trading volume in 2025 increased by 37% compared to the previous four years, with Friday trading volume surging by 42%.

Last weekend, the reasons for this growth became apparent as Trump and his Treasury Secretary released successive trade-related announcements, leading to significant market changes by Monday. The S&P 500 index rose by 3.3%, the Nasdaq 100 returned to a bull market, and credit markets showed a sharp decline in investor default concerns. Mark Clegg, a senior fixed-income trader at Milwaukee's Allspring Global Investments, emphasized the importance of reducing portfolio risk before the weekend, stating, "No one wants to enter the market on Monday morning trying to correct mistakes after significant changes."

Despite increased trading speed and volume, transaction costs remain high, particularly for asset management firms. Cantor Fitzgerald asset management portfolio manager David Schiffman remarked, "Portfolio managers are forced to sell what they can, not what they want. There's a daily lack of direction and certainty, nearing the most extreme levels I've seen in my career."

data.title: GMGN Lianchuang: Web login now supports Phantom wallet, TG accounts are often stolen and blocked
data.description: GMGN co-founder Haze posted on the X platform that the platform web login already supports Phantom wallets, and GMGN will automatically generate a private key wallet, just like TG login. Haze added that the main reason for supporting Phantom wallets is that TG accounts are often stolen and blocked.

data.title: Strategy directors sold $5.2 million of company stock in the past month and plan to continue selling this week
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) documents, Jarrod M. Patten, director of Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), sold $5.2 million worth of Class A shares in less than a month and plans to sell another $300,000 worth of shares this week.
Strategy is currently the largest publicly traded Bitcoin holder, holding more than $58 billion worth of Bitcoin. The company's stock price rose more than 20% between April 22 and May 14, hitting a year-to-date high of $421.61 this week. (DL News)

data.title: Singapore Fintech Employee Sentenced for USDT Theft in Hong Kong
data.description:
According to PANews, a Singapore-based fintech company's Hong Kong branch experienced a significant theft involving over 3.2 million USDT, valued at approximately 26 million Hong Kong dollars. The incident involved an employee who executed 64 unauthorized transactions from the company's virtual currency account, transferring the funds to various electronic wallets on different trading platforms. Authorities have successfully recovered virtual currency worth about 8.6 million Hong Kong dollars, along with 4.65 million Hong Kong dollars in cash and assets.

The individual involved has been charged with one count of theft and three counts of handling property known or believed to represent proceeds from indictable offenses. The accused admitted to the charges in the Hong Kong High Court and was found guilty, receiving a sentence of 78 months in prison.

data.title: DeGods Founder Faces NFT Wallet Breach, Significant Losses Reported
data.description:
According to PANews, DeGods founder Frank, also known as Rohun Vora, experienced a security breach in his Solana wallet, resulting in the unauthorized sale of 16 DeGods NFTs. The incident led to a loss of approximately 108 SOL, equivalent to $19,000. This breach occurred just three days after Frank announced his resignation as CEO. He confirmed to the media that the incident was a hacking attack and dismissed rumors suggesting he had sold the NFTs himself, emphasizing that he still holds a substantial amount of DeGods assets.

The floor price of DeGods NFTs has significantly dropped from a peak of $37,000 in 2023 to around $1,000 currently. This week, Frank handed over the project to team members known by the pseudonyms Pasta and Chill, while he continues to hold over $50,000 worth of DEGOD ecosystem tokens. The NFT project has previously faced controversy due to multiple cross-chain migrations and had invested in shares of a BIG3 basketball league team in 2022.

data.title: xAI Investigates Unauthorized Modifications to Grok's Prompts
data.description:
According to Foresight News, xAI announced that the prompts for its AI chatbot Grok on the platform X were altered without authorization on May 15, 2025, at 10:33 AM UTC+8. The modifications involved political topics, which breached the company's internal policies. In response, xAI has initiated an investigation and is implementing measures to enhance the transparency and reliability of Grok. These measures include making Grok's system prompts publicly available on GitHub, strengthening the review process for prompt modifications, and establishing a team for round-the-clock monitoring.

Previously, Foresight News reported that Grok had repeatedly mentioned the topic of "white genocide in South Africa."

data.title: DeGods founder Frank’s wallet was hacked and 16 DeGods NFTs were stolen
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Solana wallet of Frank (Rohun Vora), the founder of the NFT project DeGods, was hacked, and 16 DeGods NFTs were sold, with a loss of about 108 SOL (US$19,000). The incident occurred three days after he announced his resignation as CEO. Frank confirmed to the media that it was caused by a hacker attack, denied rumors that he sold NFTs, and emphasized that he still holds a large number of DeGods assets.
The floor price of DeGods has fallen from a peak of US$37,000 in 2023 to around US$1,000 currently. Frank handed over the project to pseudonymous team members Pasta and Chill this week, and he personally still holds DEGOD ecological tokens worth more than US$50,000. The NFT project has caused controversy due to multiple cross-chain migrations, and in 2022 it also invested in BIG3 basketball league team shares. (Decrypt)

data.title: Bitcoin.com News Releases the Top 10 Cryptocurrency Exchanges in the World in 2025
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Odaily Planet Daily News Recently, Bitcoin.com News, a media co-founded by early Bitcoin evangelist Roger Ver, released an analysis report on the world's top ten cryptocurrency exchanges in 2025.
Data shows that Binance ranks first with a spot trading volume of US$2.2 trillion and a market share of 40.7% in the first quarter. Bybit ranked second with $3.61 billion in net inflows and $14.9 billion TVL in March. Bitget ranked third with a quarterly trading volume of US$2.08 trillion and a spot growth rate of 159% month-on-month, and a global user base of 120 million. Coinbase's derivatives trading volume increased by 6,200% year-on-year, ranking fourth; Kraken ranked fifth with an average daily spot trading volume of US$283 million and over 13 million users.
The report analysis pointed out that each exchange exhibited different characteristics in terms of compliance, product innovation and user growth. Binance has outstanding advantages in depth and liquidity, Bybit stands out with high inflows and TVL, Bitget and Coinbase are notable in user growth and derivatives performance respectively, and Kraken maintains a stable user base. In addition, the article mentioned that the current market is in a stage of adjustment. As the regulatory environment gradually becomes clearer and traditional financial institutions accelerate their entry, the crypto trading industry may usher in development opportunities in the second half of the year.

data.title: Crypto Market Sentiment Remains in 'Greed' Zone
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Alternative data indicates that the current crypto Fear and Greed Index stands at 71, slightly up from yesterday's 70, with last week's average at 73. This suggests that market sentiment continues to be in the 'greed' zone.

The Fear and Greed Index ranges from 0 to 100 and is calculated based on several indicators: volatility (25%), market trading volume (25%), social media activity (15%), market surveys (15%), Bitcoin's market dominance (10%), and Google search trends (10%).

data.title: Bounce Brand launches new brand branch Bounce Auction, focusing on on-chain physical auctions
data.description:
The Masters of Time auction series has officially started, and a watch will be auctioned every two weeks in the form of an on-chain lottery on the Bounce app. Each auction is open for a week, during which users can purchase lottery tickets to participate. Each lottery ticket is priced at 5 AUCTION tokens, and a single address can purchase an unlimited number of lottery tickets. After the auction, the smart contract will randomly draw a lottery ticket as the winning ticket, and its holder will win the watch of the auction. The winner can receive an NFT as a certificate of ownership of the watch. The NFT supports transfer, and any holder can use the NFT to receive the corresponding watch at the event held by Bounce at Token 2049 in Singapore.
The first item in the Masters of Time series is the Audemars Piguet Royal Oak series automatic watch. Follow the official X account of Bounce Auction to get the latest auction updates.

data.title: Crypto KOL pow sold 7.6 million LAUNCHCOIN in the past hour, with an average selling price of $0.203
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, crypto KOL pow (@traderpow) sold 7.6 million LAUNCHCOIN at $0.203 in the past hour in exchange for 9,040 SOL (1.54 million US dollars).
pow currently holds 4.75 million LAUNCHCOIN (1 million US dollars) in the wallet and 4.49 million LAUNCHCOIN (950,000 US dollars) in the liquidity pool.

data.title: Brazil fintech gets approval to become a Bitcoin treasury company
data.description:
Méliuz’s executive chairman says his fintech firm has become Brazil’s first publicly-traded Bitcoin treasury company following shareholder approval, with the firm also announcing it bought $28. 4 million worth of Bitcoin to add to its existing stack. “Historic day! Our shareholders have approved, by a wide majority, the transformation of Méliuz into the first Bitcoin Treasury Company listed in Brazil,” Israel Salmen posted to X on May 15. Salmen said the firm snapped up 274
